$comment: DEFAULT config for the 'project' Spec Kit extension. Ships with NO board-specific ids. Run `speckit project init` (scripts/*/project-init.*) in the consuming repo to discover the board, map phases to your Status columns, and write the real .specify/extensions/project/config.json. 'phaseToStatus' holds the DEFAULT column names init tries to match on your board (exact -> fuzzy -> prompt -> optional auto-create).
